name: Vadu AI
description: « An all-in-one platform that makes it easy to use the best video models (Sora, Veo3, Kling, Runway, Luma, Flux). You can also animate your photos or transform your videos with special effects

name: Leadde AI
description: « A tool to transform your documents (DOC, PDF, PPT) into multilingual training videos (170+ languages). With AI avatars and adjustable automatic voices. An ideal platform for creating animated presentations with dialogues and natural transitions

name: GoCrazyAI
description: « An uncensored AI video and image generation platform offering great creative freedom. The platform also features celebrity selfie generators, lip-sync studio, instant face swap, and more

name: AI Song Creator Pro
description: « Turn your words or ideas into complete music tracks with a choice of style, tempo, and instruments. Export your creations as MP3 or WAV files so you can easily use them on your social media or in your audio projects

name: Math AI
description: « Solve your equations and exercises step by step by entering a problem or uploading a photo of the text to be analyzed. This online service provides detailed explanations for topics ranging from arithmetic to algebra, geometry, and advanced calculations

name: AI Virtual Staging
description: « Enhance your real estate photos by adding furniture, decor, and objects to enhance the space without physical work. The service offers several ready-to-use design styles to better visualize the rooms

name: TextToHuman
description: « Transform text generated by ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini into natural text that bypasses GPTZero, Turnitin, and other AI detectors. This free tool also offers an automatic Autopilot mode

name: Sketch To
description: « Convert a photo into different sketch styles (pencil, ink, watercolor, comic, etc.) or turn a drawing into a realistic image in seconds. Several levels of detail are available, as well as a professional mode for high-resolution renderings

name: Create Music AI
description: « Turn a description into a complete song (lyrics + instrumental). You'll also find tools to separate vocals from instruments, edit MIDI files, detect tempo, or extract stems for remixing and production

name: AnyLogoGenerator
description: « Quickly create professional logos by entering a few keywords and style preferences. The tool offers several visual variations, colors, and layouts so you can choose a version that suits your brand

name: GoEnhance Image to Video AI
description: « A powerful all-in-one video and image generation platform. Transform videos, animate photos, and create consistent characters using popular models such as Veo, Sora, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Flux, and many more

name: Typli.ai
description: « Use over 180 tools to generate texts, letters, emails, summaries, or product descriptions. This powerful platform also includes features for rephrasing, structuring long content, and creating images

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
